name: MENINGEAL CYST
definition: abnormal dilatation of meninges within sacral canal / foramina ± presacral component dilated nerve-root sleeve as normal variant OCCULT INTRASACRAL MENINGOCELE
dominant_finding: remodeling erosion of sacral canal / foramen ← CSF pulsations
discriminating_features: remodeling erosion of sacral canal / foramen ← CSF pulsations
cyst communicates freely with subarachnoid space
cyst wall continuous with arachnoid + dura

general: remodeling erosion of sacral canal / foramen ← CSF pulsations
cyst communicates freely with subarachnoid space
cyst wall continuous with arachnoid + dura
cyst cavity occupies space between peri- and endoneurium
bone remodeling + enlargement of neural foramen
cyst does not communicate with subarachnoid space

clinical.Rx: surgical decompression, sacral laminectomy, percutaneous drainage
